name: edtech-partner-success
description: EdTech-flavored Partner Success Manager team — 6 specialist agents anchored on the PSM lane (partner-success-manager, success-playbook-designer, qbr-composer, learning-analytics-analyst, ferpa-comms-translator, partner-profile-curator) with 4 skills, 8 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 7-doc knowledge bank: 3 production-lesson files (rostering-data-quality-typology, partner-health-score-drift, parent-comms-jurisdictional-bear-traps) and 4 research-distilled foundational files (customer-success-frameworks, edtech-segment-fundamentals, psm-metrics-glossary, psm-tools-landscape-2026) — all with compact inline priors on the 6 affected agents and primary-source citations. Vertical-explicit but segment-agnostic — fits K-12, higher-ed, corporate L&D, or mixed EdTech books. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols including the alternate-methods Capability Grounding Protocol.
